rationale: The citing paper gives Anderson et al. (2015) a dedicated conceptual role in the literature review, not just a grouped background mention. It explicitly describes the canary category effect as the inverse of the harbinger customer effect and uses that contrast to position its contribution. This citation helps frame the paper's core idea about negative predictive signals in purchase behavior, even though the paper does not directly reuse the cited paper's model or estimation approach.
relation_description: The citing paper extends the harbinger line of work by shifting the negative-signal logic from customer purchases predicting new product failure to category purchases predicting customer nonreturn to a retailer. It uses the cited paper as a conceptual benchmark and then develops a related but distinct phenomenon.
